node.statement: COMPUTATION C3 (Lanczos diagonalization): KrylovKit.eigsolve(H, :SR) for lowest k=3-5 eigenvalues. Ground state E_0 has total L=0 (verified by checking L^2 eigenvalue). Converges in ~100 iterations for dim~10^5. NEUTRAL GAP: Delta_neutral = E_1(L>0) - E_0(L=0) at fixed N,2S. Alternative: CHARGE GAP from comparing E_0 at 2S vs 2S+1. JULIA: exact_diag.jl calls KrylovKit.
